attacking_style: Pure bunch sprinter who launches between 150-300m to go, excelling at timing his acceleration behind fading rivals rather than leading out. Often positioned 3rd-7th wheel before his final jump.
team_tactics: Frequently operates with reduced or failed leadout support, showing ability to win by parasiting rival trains (Deceuninck, Bennett's wheel). When Lotto-Soudal train functions, vulnerable to its absence when disrupted.
terrain_preference: Best on technical finales with corners/roundabouts in final kilometer where positioning chaos favors his gap-finding and late acceleration. Exposed on uphill sprints and when crosswinds create echelons; struggles on climbs even compared to Cavendish.
vulnerability: Gets trapped or boxed in chaotic sprints lacking clear leadout (6+ instances). Positioning errors when isolated early. Crosswinds split him repeatedly. Injury-prone (knee issues, crashes). Mental fragility when winless streaks develop.
key_patterns: Superior raw acceleration 150-200m out can overcome poor positioning, nearly erasing deficits (4+ instances)
Excels at wheel-surfing rival leadouts then timing late jump, particularly Deceuninck/Bennett trains (5+ instances)
Frequently boxed/trapped in barriers or loses position in chaotic finales without leadout (6+ observations)
Vulnerable on climbs and crosswind splits; distanced on Ardennes-type hills repeatedly (5+ instances)
Tactical flexibility: switches between trains mid-sprint when own leadout fails or absent (4+ occasions)
Form fragility: injury abandons, illness DNS, three-year Tour winless streak until 2023 resurgence
form_trajectory: positive: After three winless Tour years, near-wins on stages 3 and 4 in 2023 plus 2021-2022 scattered wins suggest form recovering from 2021-2022 injury/illness nadir, though still inconsistent
